title: Gift Card Usage

narrative: The user is looking for practical information about a generic gift card (e.g., UpCadhoc, CADO, Illicado) such as a list of participating merchants, online and offline acceptance locations, how to locate nearby stores via maps, and instructions for checking or topping up the card balance. Relevant documents should describe the card’s acceptance network, ordering or tracking options, and balance‑checking features, while unrelated material (e.g., unrelated e‑commerce pages, unrelated product reviews) is not relevant.

title: Lamb Tagine Recipe
description: Looking for a recipe and cooking instructions for a lamb tagine.
narrative: The user wants a practical lamb tagine recipe, including a list of ingredients, preparation steps, cooking time, and any helpful tips. Relevant documents are those that provide a full lamb tagine recipe (traditional or simple versions) with clear instructions and ingredient details. Documents that only mention lamb tagine incidentally, focus on unrelated variations (e.g., with prunes, dates, or other fruits) or discuss non‑recipe topics are not relevant.

title: Lotus Car Info

Relevant documents should mention Lotus models, provide price ranges, mileage, year, engine type, or sales listings. Relevant documents should present a full recipe (e.g., a French‑style or oven‑baked version) with clear instructions. title: Car Sun Protection
description: What products or methods can protect a car’s interior and occupants from sun glare, heat, and UV radiation?
narrative: The user is seeking information about solutions that reduce solar heat, glare, and UV exposure inside a vehicle. Documents focused solely on unrelated car maintenance (batteries, cleaning, parking tips) or unrelated product categories are not relevant.

description: What products and styles are offered in Petit Bateau's "Small Boat" clothing line?
narrative: The user is interested in the Petit Bateau brand's "Small Boat" (or "Small vessel") collection. Documents that merely mention small boats in a nautical or unrelated context, or that discuss unrelated clothing or retail topics, are not relevant.

title: Passenger Cars
description: What passenger car models, specifications, pricing, and purchase options are available?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on passenger cars, including makes and models, technical features, pricing, discounts, lease‑to‑own schemes, and any special offers (e.g., collaborator or employee discounts). Relevant documents should describe specific passenger car offerings, such as Renault models, their prices, financing or lease terms, and any promotional discounts or guarantees. Non‑relevant material includes unrelated technical errors, generic adverts, or content that does not discuss passenger car products or their purchase details.

title: War School
description: What is the War School and what information does it provide about its mission, courses, publications, and enrollment?
narrative: The user is seeking factual details about an institution called the War School (e.g., the French "École de Guerre" or similar military academy), including its purpose, educational programs, publications, how to obtain materials or enroll, and contact information. Relevant documents are those that describe the War School’s website, its bookshop, e‑book offerings, the Graduate School of War, and related administrative details. Documents that discuss unrelated military research institutes, news articles, or unrelated content are not relevant.

title: Option Right Eligibility
description: What is the "right of option" at Pôle Emploi and how can a jobseeker qualify for and use it?
narrative: The user is seeking a clear, comprehensive explanation of the "right of option" (droit d'option) offered by Pôle Emploi. Relevant information should describe what the right of option is, the circumstances under which it can be exercised, the eligibility criteria (e.g., minimum number of worked hours/days, allowance thresholds, required increase of at least 30 % or daily allowance ≤ 20 €), the procedural steps (written request, advisor verification, 21‑day reflection period), and the consequences (loss of previous lower‑paid rights, new allowance amount and duration). The narrative should also cover how the right of option differs from the standard reloadable rights, any relevant deadlines, and illustrative examples that help a jobseeker decide whether to exercise the option. Documents that discuss these points in detail are considered relevant, whereas materials about unrelated topics (e.g., general Pôle Emploi organization, intermittent regime, training remuneration) are not.

title: AXA Client Space
description: How can I access and use the AXA client/customer portal?
narrative: The user is looking for information about AXA's online client area—how to log in, recover credentials, navigate the portal, and what services (e.g., contract management, document access, payments) are available. Relevant documents are those that describe the AXA client space, provide the login URL (https://client.axa.fr/), explain authentication steps, password recovery, and outline the functionalities offered to policyholders and business customers. Documents that merely mention AXA without focusing on the client portal, or that discuss unrelated topics, are not relevant.

title: Best Electric Car

title: Potato Late Blight

Relevant documents should describe late blight symptoms on leaves and tubers, discuss food safety of harvested potatoes, and outline practical control or remediation methods.

title: Return-to-Work Bonus
description: What are the eligibility conditions, amount, and application procedure for the French "return to work" (back‑to‑work) bonus?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information about the French return‑to‑work bonus (also called the back‑to‑work premium, APRE, or employment bonus). Relevant documents must explain who can receive the bonus (e.g., RSA, SSA, or specific solidarity allowance beneficiaries), the required length of employment (e.g., minimum months or hours), the contractual forms (CDD, CDI, insertion contracts), the amount of the payment (typically €1,000 or departmental limits), timing of the payment (fourth month, possibly in advance), and the exact steps to apply (forms to submit to CAF, Pôle Emploi, or the departmental RSA referee). Documents that mention the discontinuation or replacement of the bonus, or that discuss unrelated bonuses (e.g., Christmas bonus, CSP, commercial employer bonuses) are not relevant.
